title: Grilled Swordfish Oriental
instructions:
In a glass baking dish, combine all the marinade ingredients and mix well.
Place the steaks in the marinade and turn to coat. Cover and refrigerate for 4-6 hours, turning occasionally.
Remove the fish from the marinade and place on and oiled grill rack 4-6” above coals. Cook 10-14 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork. Be sure to turn the fish at least once, and brushing frequently with the marinade.
